head.title: Somnath Dwarka 3 Days 2 Nights: Rs.10,000 pp, Real Clock
head.meta: The shortest honest version of both temples. 3 days 2 nights from Rs.10,000 pp with hotel, breakfast and vehicle. Includes the one fork you must choose.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 3 Days 2 Nights: Itinerary, Price and Booking

quick_answer: A 3 days 2 nights Somnath Dwarka package costs Rs. 10,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 20,000 at 4 star and Rs. 25,000 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included. Two nights is the shortest plan that gives both temples an evening and a morning: one night in Dwarka, one night in Somnath, and the 233 km coastal run on NH51 between them. It contains exactly one hard choice, and Experience My India will make you make it before you book rather than at 9:00 am on day two.

decision.title: The fork: Bet Dwarka or the Somnath aarti
intro: On day two you drive 233 km, which is 5 to 6 hours before any stops. Bet Dwarka is a half day: Okha, across Sudarshan Setu, the island darshan, and back. Somnath's Sandhya Aarti is at 7:00 pm and the Jay Somnath show runs 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm.
You cannot have both. Here is the choice, stated plainly:

Most families pick B on a first visit, because the Somnath evening is the emotional centre of the trip and the island can wait for a longer plan. Pilgrims completing the Krishna circuit pick A. Neither is wrong. Being told about it on day two is.
If you want both, you want 4 days 3 nights. That is the entire difference the extra night buys.
Next step: tell us A or B with your dates and we will build the day-wise around it.
table: Morning aarti, island, leave Dwarka around 13:00, reach Somnath 19:00 to 20:00
The 7:00 pm aarti. You arrive during the show or after it.
Morning aarti, Nageshwar, leave Dwarka by 09:30, reach Somnath by 15:30
The 7:00 pm Sandhya Aarti, the full show, Vallabhghat at sunset

days.title: Day by day: option B, the version most families book

steps.activity: Arrive Dwarka by road, rail to Dwarka station, or fly into Jamnagar and drive. From Ahmedabad this is an 8 to 9 hour day, so it starts before sunrise.
Dwarkadhish evening darshan. The temple reopens around 5:00 pm after the afternoon closure.
Gomti Ghat and the ghat steps. Sudama Setu if the light holds.
Dinner. Early night, because tomorrow starts at 06:30.

days.title: Day 2: Dwarka to Somnath, the coastal run

steps.activity: Mangala Aarti at Dwarkadhish. Shortest queue of the day.
Nageshwar Jyotirlinga, which sits on the Dwarka to Okha road.
Leave for Somnath. NH51, 233 km, the sea on your right for long stretches.
Porbandar. Kirti Mandir and the Sudama connection, as a stop rather than a visit.
Vallabhghat for sunset over the Arabian Sea.
Jay Somnath sound and light show, 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm on the Trust's own schedule, not the 8:00 pm most pages print.
Bhalka Tirth, Triveni Sangam, Geeta Mandir, and the Ahalyabai temple built by the queen mother in 1782.
Depart. Ahmedabad is about 410 km and 7 to 8 hours. Veraval and Somnath stations are minutes away if you are on rail.

rows: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available at Somnath
notes: Rates are per person per night at Rs. 5,000, Rs. 10,000 and Rs. 12,500, multiplied by your two nights. Vehicle follows group size, from sedan to a 26 seater tempo traveller.
Not included: lunch and dinner, personal pooja, seva and abhishek, the sound and light show ticket, camera and cloakroom charges, tips, personal spending.

General darshan is free at both temples. The Shree Somnath Trust accepts bookings and donations only through its own official website, never through private numbers or UPI. We will not handle that money for you.

why_choose.title: Why choose Experience My India for a 3 day plan
points: We make you choose the fork before you book. Option A or Option B is settled in writing, so day two is not an argument in a moving car.
We hold the 7:45 pm show time, not the 8:00 pm most pages print. That fifteen minutes is the difference between the opening and the queue.
A local Gujarat team. The people planning your route drive it.
One number, answered by a planner. +91 7302265809 on call and WhatsApp.
Timings verified in July 2026 against the temple trusts, and reconfirmed before departure.
Cancellation and refund terms are on the cancellation and refund page, and booking terms on the booking policy page. More on us at about, our Gujarat team and methodology.

not_for_you.title: This plan is not for you if
items: You want Bet Dwarka and the Somnath aarti. Read the fork again. Take the 4 day plan.
You are flying in and out of Ahmedabad on days 1 and 3. The flight timings eat both ends and you are left with a 233 km drive in the middle. Add a night.
You want Gir. A dawn safari needs its own night. See 5 days 4 nights.
You want a slow trip. Two nights, two towns, 233 km. It moves.

faq.question: Is 3 days enough for Somnath and Dwarka?
faq.answer: Yes, and it is the shortest plan that is. Two nights gives each temple an evening and a morning, with the 233 km coastal drive on the middle day. What three days cannot also hold is Bet Dwarka plus the Somnath evening aarti on the same day.

faq.question: What is the cost of a 3 days 2 nights Somnath Dwarka package?
faq.answer: Rs. 10,000 per person at 3 star, Rs. 20,000 at 4 star and Rs. 25,000 at 5 star, hotel, breakfast and vehicle included.

faq.question: Should we do Dwarka first or Somnath first?
faq.answer: Either works. Dwarka first suits arrivals via Jamnagar airport or Dwarka station. Somnath first suits arrivals via Diu, Keshod or Veraval. The clock is the same in reverse. We pick the direction around your inbound leg.

faq.question: How long is the drive from Dwarka to Somnath?
faq.answer: 233 km on NH51, 5 to 6 hours through Porbandar and Veraval, before stops.

faq.question: What time is the Somnath light and sound show?
faq.answer: The Shree Somnath Trust lists Jay Somnath at 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm, weather permitting. Most travel pages still say 8:00 pm.

final_cta: Three days, two temples, one fork. Tell us A or B, your dates and your group size on +91 7302265809, and you get the day-wise plan and the rate for your tier.
